name: tokenlens
install_doc: brew install ollama && ollama serve && ollama pull llama3.2 && ollama pull phi3 && git clone https://github.com/lavanyaashri/TokenLens && cd TokenLens && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m uvicorn backend.main:app --reload
notes: Research/benchmarking web UI tool: compresses text (extractive embedding-based + abstractive LLM summarization via Ollama), scores output with ROUGE-L and semantic similarity, plots quality-vs-compression tradeoff curve across 9 ratios. Operates on documents pasted or uploaded by user — NOT a coding agent hook. Fully local (Ollama), no API keys. NOT cache-safe in the Anthropic sense: has no awareness of Claude context caching. Target: humans researching prompt compression, not coding agents.
